mapper.select: SELECT * FROM saf.tn_saf_batch WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO saf.tn_saf_batch ( batch_id, oprtr_id, poc_id_no, poc_isue_dt, dprtr_recv_co_nm, saf_recv_arprt_cd, saf_recv_cntry_cd, cust_chn_modl_cd, batch_qty, energy_cn, dnsty_se_cd, neat_saf_dnsty, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{batchId}, #{oprtrId}, #{pocIdNo}, #{pocIsueDt}, #{dptrRecvCoNm}, #{safRecvArprtNm}, #{safRecvCntryCd}, #{custChnModlCd}, #{batchQty}, #{energyCn}, #{dnstySecd}, #{neatSafDnsty}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE saf.tn_saf_batch SET poc_id_no = #{pocIdNo}, poc_isue_dt = #{pocIsueDt}, dprtr_recv_co_nm = #{dptrRecvCoNm}, saf_recv_arprt_cd = #{safRecvArprtNm}, saf_recv_cntry_cd = #{safRecvCntryCd}, cust_chn_modl_cd = #{custChnModlCd}, batch_qty = #{batchQty}, energy_cn = #{energyCn}, dnsty_se_cd = #{dnstySecd}, neat_saf_dnsty = #{neatSafDnsty}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
UPDATE saf.tn_saf_batch SET use_end_dt = NOW() - INTERVAL '1 minute', last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{userId} WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} AND use_end_dt > NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT batch_id, poc_id_no, saf_recv_arprt_cd FROM saf.tn_saf_batch WHERE oprtr_id = #{oprtrId} AND use_end_dt > NOW() ORDER BY frst_reg_dt DESC
